title: Configure Caducus with YAML, env vars, and CLI overrides

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
As an operator, I want Caducus to load configuration from YAML, environment variables, and CLI overrides, so that I can control collection and analysis behavior consistently across environments.

Feature: Caducus configuration layering
  Scenario: Load merged configuration from home, local, and explicit files
    Given a home Caducus configuration file
    And a local Caducus configuration file
    And an explicit configuration file argument
    When I run the Caducus CLI with the explicit configuration file
    Then Caducus composes the files in precedence order
    And later configuration values override earlier ones

  Scenario: Environment variables override configuration values
    Given a Caducus configuration file with analysis settings
    And environment variables for Biblicus-backed settings are present
    When I run a Caducus command
    Then Caducus uses the environment variable values instead of the file values

  Scenario: CLI overrides update any config path
    Given a Caducus configuration file
    When I run the Caducus CLI with dotted --config overrides
    Then Caducus applies the overrides to the merged configuration
    And Caducus can override values inside the biblicus configuration subtree
